title: Super Micro Jumps 13% on Record $60B Order Backlog; Dell, HPE Rally on AI Server Read-Through
excerpt: Super Micro Computer just posted preliminary numbers that sent margin bears scrambling for cover, and the ripple is already moving through the AI server sect...
content_html:
Quick Read

  • SMCI surged 13% after Super Micro Computer's Q4 gross margin guidance jumped to 15%-17%, far above prior 8% guidance, pulling DELL and HPE shares higher.

  • NVIDIA silicon powers all three AI server makers, with Super Micro Computer reporting GPU-related platforms driving over 80% of its revenue.

  • Bears cite governance concerns and a $7B dilution overhang, while bulls point to the record backlog ahead of Super Micro Computer's August 11 earnings.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Dell Technologies didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) shares are up 13% to $28.75 in Wednesday morning trading after the company delivered a preliminary Q4 FY2026 business update that stunned the margin bears. The rally appears to be pulling Super Micro's AI server peers higher, with Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) stock up 2% to $414 and Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) shares up 1% to $47.22.

The move caps a bruising stretch for Super Micro Computer shares, which entered the session down 13% year to date (YTD) and off 50% over the past year. Wednesday's pop reframes the setup heading into the full August 11 report.

Margin Guide Silences the Bears

The catalyst is a preliminary update Super Micro Computer released after Tuesday's close. The company disclosed more than $60 billion in new orders booked during the quarter ended June 30, with backlog at record levels.

The bigger surprise sits in the margin line. Super Micro Computer guided fiscal Q4 gross margin to 15% to 17%, materially above prior guidance of 8.2% to 8.4%, citing a "favorable customer and product mix." Revenue is expected near the low end of the $11 billion to $12.5 billion range, versus analyst estimates near $11.67 billion per LSEG.

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Dell Technologies didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Wall Street responded quickly. Barclays raised its price target on Super Micro Computer stock to $38 from $34, keeping an Equal Weight rating. Rosenblatt lifted its target to $45 from $40 with a Buy rating, arguing that Super Micro's Q4 order book reinforces the company's "industry-leading" time-to-market advantage in the AI infrastructure buildout.

Peers Ride the AI Server Read-Through

Dell and HPE aren't reporting news of their own today. The rally reflects a read-through: if Super Micro Computer's book is filling that fast, hyperscaler and enterprise AI capex is still accelerating, and both peers already have proof points on the board.

sentences.en: The rally reflects a read-through: if Super Micro Computer's book is filling that fast, hyperscaler and enterprise AI capex is still accelerating, and both peers already have proof points on the board.
sentences.zh: 这次反弹反映了一个通读：如果超微计算机的账簿填得那么快，那么超大规模和企业人工智能资本支出仍在加速，而且两家同行都已经在董事会上有了证据。

content_html_zh:
快速阅读

  • 在超微电脑第四季度毛利率指导跃升至 15%-17%（远高于之前的 8% 指导）后，SMCI 飙升 13%，带动戴尔和 HPE 股价走高。
  • NVIDIA 芯片为所有三个 AI 服务器制造商提供动力，超微计算机报告 GPU 相关平台贡献了其 80% 以上的收入。
  • 看跌者指出治理问题和 70 亿美元的稀释悬而未决，而看多者则指出超微电脑 8 月 11 日公布财报之前积压创纪录的情况。
  • 立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而戴尔科技公司却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

Super Micro Computer（纳斯达克股票代码：SMCI）股价在周三早盘交易中上涨 13%，至 28.75 美元，此前该公司发布了 2026 财年第四季度的初步业务更新，令保证金空头感到震惊。 此次上涨似乎拉动了超微的人工智能服务器同行走高，戴尔科技公司（纽约证券交易所代码：DELL）股价上涨2％，至414美元，惠普企业（纽约证券交易所代码：HPE）股价上涨1％，至47.22美元。

此举为超微电脑股价的大幅上涨画上了句号，该股年初至今已下跌 13%，较去年下跌 50%。 周三的流行音乐重新构建了 8 月 11 日完整报告的设置。

保证金指南让空头噤声

催化剂是超微电脑在周二收盘后发布的初步更新。 该公司披露，截至 6 月 30 日的季度新订单量超过 600 亿美元，积压订单达到创纪录水平。

更大的惊喜在于利润线。 Super Micro Computer 将第四财季毛利率指引为 15% 至 17%，远高于先前指引的 8.2% 至 8.4%，理由是“有利的客户和产品组合”。 预计每个 LSEG 的收入接近 110 亿美元至 125 亿美元范围的低端，而分析师估计接近 116.7 亿美元。

立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而戴尔科技公司却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

华尔街迅速做出反应。 巴克莱将超微电脑股票的目标价从 34 美元上调至 38 美元，维持“同等权重”评级。 Rosenblatt 将目标评级从 40 美元上调至 45 美元，给予买入评级，认为超微第四季度的订单强化了该公司在人工智能基础设施建设方面“行业领先”的上市时间优势。

同行们通过 AI 服务器进行通读

戴尔和慧与今天没有发布自己的新闻。 这次反弹反映了一个通读：如果超微计算机的账簿填得那么快，那么超大规模和企业人工智能资本支出仍在加速，而且两家同行都已经在董事会上有了证据。
